infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LocalCheck uses your location to find courts near you and show who's playing nearby.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LocalCheck uses your camera to photograph and verify a court you're adding.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LocalCheck lets you attach a photo to verify a court you're adding.
